title: C-Tier Beginnings
description:
The official C-Tier Beginnings pack as played by the C-Tier streamer group on Twitch and YouTube. 

A pack that aims to make a relaxing chill experience with a nice blend between magic, tech, exploration, and building mods. There's something for everyone!
body:
The official C-Tier Beginnings pack used by the C-Tier members in their videos and streams on Twitch and Youtube.

This pack aims to blend magic, tech, building, and exploration into a kitchen sink like experience designed for relaxing and having fun!

Build up your industry with mods like Create, Powah, Applied Energistics 2, and Deep Mob Learning. 
Delve into the schools of magic with Botania, Spectrum, and the RPG/Spellblades Series of mods. Build your most beautiful base possible with Chipped and Macaw's mods. 
There's a whole world to explore too! With mods like Ad Astra, Better End/Nether, Better Archeology, Deeper and Darker, Bumblezone, Mine Cells, and more!
For those who are seeking new tools Hepestus provides an experience similar to Tinker's Construct for Fabric.

All this and even more to uncover are at your fingertips with C-Tier Beginnings!

This pack contains:

Deep Mob Learning: [https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-mob-learning-refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-mob-learning-refabricated)

When Dungeons Arise: [https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)
